zh.lifeSummary: 當Adelheid von Metz於0970年出生在法國豪吉爾艾吉海姆時，她的父親Richard von Metz20歲，母親Bertha24歲。她於0986年與Heinrich von Speyer Graf im Wormsgau結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1046年5月19日在德國巴登-爾特波格額林根享年76歲，埋葬在德國巴登-爾特波格額林根。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adelheid von Metz于0970年出生在法国豪吉爾艾吉海姆时，她的父亲Richard von Metz20岁，母亲Bertha24岁。她于0986年与Heinrich von Speyer Graf im Wormsgau结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1046年5月19日在德国巴登-爾特波格額林根享年76岁，埋葬在德国巴登-爾特波格額林根。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Metz
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: from a short form of the female personal name Mechthild, composed of ancient Germanic maht ‘might, strength’ + hild ‘strife, battle’.

German, French (Alsace and Lorraine), and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from Metz in Lorraine, which took its name from a Gaulish tribe, the Mediomatrici; in the name of the place this became abbreviated to Mettis, hence the modern name.
German: from Mätz, a short form of the personal name Matthias (see Matthew ).

variants.name: Mette
meanings: North German: from a pet form of the female personal name Mechthild (see Metz ).
North German: occupational name for a miller, from Middle Low German matte, mette ‘dry measure’.
French: topographic name from Old French mete ‘boundary stone, boundary’ (from Latin meta ‘bounded estate’).

variants.name: Metzer
meanings: German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name for someone from Metz (see   Metz  ).
Dutch: occupational name for a bricklayer, Middle Dutch metsere.

variants.name: Matthew
meanings: English and Scottish: from the Middle English personal name Ma(t)thew, a vernacular form of the Greek New Testament name Matthias, Matthaios, which is ultimately from the Hebrew personal name Matityahu ‘gift of God’. This was taken into Latin as Mat(t)hias and Matthaeus respectively, the former being used for the twelfth apostle (who replaced Judas Iscariot) and the latter for the author of the first Gospel. In many European languages this distinction is reflected in different name forms. The commonest vernacular forms of the personal name, including English Matthew, Old French Matheu, Spanish Mateo, Italian Matteo, Portuguese Mateus, Catalan and Occitan Mateu are generally derived from the form Matthaeus. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, including German Matthias , Greek Mathias and Mattheos, Assyrian/Chaldean Matti , Czech Matěj, Slovak, Croatian, and Slovenian Matej . The name Matthew is also found among Christians in southern India (compare Mathai ), but since South Indians traditionally do not have hereditary surnames, the southern Indian name was in most cases registered as such only after immigration of its bearers to the US. Compare Mathew , see also Matthews .

variants.name: Metze
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Armin, Gerhard, Gernot.
metronymic from a short form of the personal name Mechthild (see Metz 1).

nameMeanings.name: Adelheid
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Adelheid von Metz was born in 0970, in Eguisheim, Haut-Rhin, France, her father, Richard von Metz, was 20 and her mother, Bertha, was 24. She married Heinrich von Speyer Graf im Wormsgau in 0986. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 19 May 1046, in Öhringen, Baden-Württemberg, Germany, at the age of 76, and was buried in Öhringen, Baden-Württemberg, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adelheid von Metz est née en 0970, à Eguisheim, Haut-Rhin, France, son père, Richard von Metz, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Bertha, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Heinrich von Speyer Graf im Wormsgau en 0986. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 19 mai 1046, à Öhringen, Baden-Württemberg, Allemagne, à l’âge de 76 ans, et a été enterrée à Öhringen, Baden-Württemberg, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adelheid von Metz 0970 in Egisheim, Haut-Rhin, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard von Metz 20 und ihre Mutter Bertha 24. Sie hat 0986 Heinrich von Speyer Graf im Wormsgau geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 19. Mai 1046 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Öhringen, Baden-Württemberg, Deutschland und wurde in Öhringen, Baden-Württemberg, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adelheid von Metz è nata il nel 0970 nel Eguisheim, Haut-Rhin, Francia, sua padre, Richard von Metz, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Bertha, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Heinrich von Speyer Graf im Wormsgau nel 0986. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 19 maggio 1046, nel Öhringen, Baden-Württemberg, Germania, all'età di 76 anni, e fu sepolta a Öhringen, Baden-Württemberg, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Adelheid von Metzが0970年にフランスハウト-ルヒンエグイシェイムで生まれた時，父Richard von Metzは20歳，母Berthaは24歳であった。0986年にHeinrich von Speyer Graf im Wormsgauと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1046年5月19日にドイツバデン-ウuルッテンバーグohリンジェンで76歳で死去し，ドイツバデン-ウuルッテンバーグohリンジェンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Adelheid von Metz(이)가 0970년 프랑스 하트-히 길셰임에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard von Metz(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Bertha(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 0986년 Heinrich von Speyer Graf im Wormsgau(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1046년 5월 19일 독일 바데-wu르테버그 oh링에서 76세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 바데-wu르테버그 oh링에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adelheid von Metz nasceu em 0970, em Eguisheim, Haut-Rhin, França, seu pai, Richard von Metz, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Bertha, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Heinrich von Speyer Graf im Wormsgau em 0986. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 19 de maio de 1046, em Öhringen, Baden-Württemberg, Alemanha, com 76 anos, e foi sepultada em Öhringen, Baden-Württemberg, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adelheid von Metz родилась в 0970 г. в местности эгуишим, хаут-рин, Франция, её отцу по имени Richard von Metz было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Bertha, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Heinrich von Speyer Graf im Wormsgau в 0986 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 19 мая 1046 г. в местности oхринген, баден-вuрттембирг, Германия в возрасте 76 лет и была похоронена в местности oхринген, баден-вuрттембирг, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adelheid von Metz nació en 0970, en Eguisheim, Haut-Rhin, Francia, su papá, Richard von Metz, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Bertha, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Heinrich von Speyer Graf im Wormsgau en 0986. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 19 de mayo de 1046, en Öhringen, Baden-Württemberg, Alemania, a la edad de 76 años, y fue sepultada en Öhringen, Baden-Württemberg, Alemania.
